title: 2m x 10m Garden Netting
features: This garden netting is ideal for protecting seedlings, vegetables, strawberry plants & soft fruits etc.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: The Green Blade 2m x 10m Garden Netting is designed to protect and cultivate various plants such as seedlings, vegetables, strawberry plants, and soft fruits. It features a sturdy polyethylene (PE) material and approximately 2 x 2cm mesh size, providing optimal breathability and protection. Its dimensions are perfect for covering small to medium-sized garden areas. With a dedicated customer service team, Green Blade ensures peace of mind, making this netting an ideal choice for garden enthusiasts. The product is available in a 1 Pack/S size and comes with care instructions for long-lasting use.
